recommendations.title: Perfect Strangers
recommendations.overview: During a dinner, a group of friends decide to share whatever message or phone call they will receive during the evening, with unforeseen consequences.

recommendations.title: Perfect Strangers
recommendations.overview: During a lunar eclipse, seven friends gather for dinner and decide to play a game in which they must share with each other the content of every message, email or phone call they receive throughout the evening.

recommendations.title: Hello
recommendations.overview: Call-center workers receive a phone call from God.

recommendations.title: Anonymously Yours
recommendations.overview: After an accidental text message turns into a digital friendship, Vale and Alex start crushing on each other without realizing they've met in real life.

recommendations.title: Nothing to Hide
recommendations.overview: To spice up a dinner party, old friends agree to share every private message that pops up on their phones -- with disastrous results.

recommendations.title: The Perfect Secret
recommendations.overview: Seven friends - three women and four men - meet for dinner. Everyone should put their cell phone on the table. No matter what message comes in - anyone can read it and listen to the phone calls. However, this leads to a lot of chaos.

recommendations.title: Pride
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a group of LGBT activists decide to raise money to support the National Union of Mineworkers during their lengthy strike. There is only one problem: the Union seems embarrassed to receive their support.

recommendations.title: Text for You
recommendations.overview: Sports writer Mark is baffled when he receives romantic text messages on his cell phone. What he does not know: His new number once belonged to the deceased boyfriend of Clara, who continues to send text messages in order to cope with the loss. When

recommendations.title: Through My Window
recommendations.overview: Raquel's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor turns into something more when he starts developing feelings for her, despite his family's objections.

recommendations.title: Dinner for One
recommendations.overview: A very old woman wants to have dinner with her friends. As they are all dead, the butler has to play the role of every guest.
